title: The Fighters Climb Crooked Ladders
description: Pages 6–10 focus on the fighters climb crooked ladders, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as kanjuro's drawings help the fighters climb the plateau, turning the absurd rescue into a practical route toward the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Turn the handle and open the door!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You guys have gotten too carried away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All of you were born to be nothing more than smile-making slaves!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You think that just because you've finally figured everything out, you're going to Galavant around and make a ruckus everywhere?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: OH NO!! It's the factory boss!! Be careful of her "kyuin Machine"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Noo, even after we unlocked it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: A super strong robot came to help us--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: This here is the giant human "fraland"!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You are "Cyborg Franky" of the "Strawhat Pi- Rates" aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: If I recall correctly, you are a one-star "convict"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: And you have made it this far unscathed ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: In that case... I'll have to kill you with my own hands ...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Did he fall in love with the factory boss?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What the hell are you playing at?! Let me go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: That cyborng hunk of junk!! How dare he trick me--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I don't see any little old lady in trou- BLE anywhere !!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Although at the same time, I'm re- Lieved!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: -If you're gonna keep holding onto me, I'm just gonna keep pounding the crap outta you....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What are you doing, trying to strike oil in the back of my head ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Haah? What the heck are you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: What do you think you're doing, using my head for a hammer like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: How dare you treat me so cruely?! I'm the boss of this factory!! I'm number one... no one's higher than me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I have the authority to judge you!! You'll be executed for this!!! Your body will be torn to pieces...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Waah!! Run, Frankand!! Once the factory boss pops her top like that, no one can stop her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: I'll yank out all your guts with my kyuin machine!!

summary: The Fighters Climb Crooked Ladders develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #4, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
